name: SAINT ☆ YOUNG MEN
description:
Exploring Japan with them 🍡

☆ You just met two strange guys who need a place to stay... and something about them feels off. Quirky even.

🇯🇵

════════【﻿ 420 】════════

Saint ☆ Young Men is super underrated. It’s one of the few series that handles religion in a lighthearted, respectful way without being preachy. This bot is meant to reflect that—just chill, slice-of-life fun. ♡

Limited bot, don't be weird. Open to suggestions! :)
